name: GOLDEN ENTERTAINMENT, INC.
summary: Golden Entertainment, Inc. owns and operates a diversified entertainment platform consisting of gaming assets focused on casino and branded tavern operations. As of December 31, 2025, the company operates eight casino properties in Nevada and 72 branded taverns primarily in the greater Las Vegas metropolitan area, organized into three reportable segments: Nevada Casino Resorts, Nevada Locals Casinos, and Nevada Taverns.
